headline: Citizens Launches Nationwide Volunteer Initiative in Recognition of America’s 250th Anniversary; Releases 2025 Sustainability & Impact Report
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., June 29, 2026--Citizens today announced a nationwide volunteer initiative in recognition of America’s 250th anniversary and released its 2025 Sustainability & Impact Report, detailing continued investment in communities, workforce development, financial empowerment, small business growth and environmental sustainability.

headline: Shore Bancshares Inc (SHBI) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?
summary: Shore Bancshares (SHBI) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $79
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $73 to $79.
